content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年07月13日 周一
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [mereyabdenbekuly-ctrl/clodex-ide](https://github.com/mereyabdenbekuly-ctrl/clodex-ide)
   Local-first, zero-trust agentic IDE for verifiable autonomous software developme | ⭐638
2. [CoscoAI/luxy-aisre](https://github.com/CoscoAI/luxy-aisre)
   AISRE for Cosco | ⭐368
3. [cosmtrek/mindwalk](https://github.com/cosmtrek/mindwalk)
   A visualization tool that replays coding-agent sessions on a 3D map of your code | ⭐314
4. [yetone/kill-ai-slop](https://github.com/yetone/kill-ai-slop)
   A field guide to the visual & copy tics of AI-generated products — and an Agent  | ⭐302
5. [dongguatanglinux/grok-build-auth](https://github.com/dongguatanglinux/grok-build-auth)
   Protocol research client: x.ai signup → SSO → Grok Build OAuth → CLIProxyAPI aut | ⭐192
6. [pengchujin/jzsub](https://github.com/pengchujin/jzsub)
   JZSub — 一条视频链接，自动交付最高画质、封面和 GPT 双语字幕 MP4。 | ⭐166
7. [KORAYTEACHER/fintech-advisor](https://github.com/KORAYTEACHER/fintech-advisor)
   ai fintech financial advisor for your portfolio | ⭐165
8. [nicobailon/grill-for-unknowns](https://github.com/nicobailon/grill-for-unknowns)
   Agent skill for finding unknowns, grilling plans, and reaching shared understand | ⭐164

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
